title: Phonics Blends & Digraphs
description: The bridge between letters and fluent reading: sh, ch, th, bl, tr and friends. Each card shows the blend in three real words with a picture cue, plus a silly tongue-twister on the back.
benefits: Targets the exact stage where many readers stall
Tongue-twisters make repetition feel like a game
Sequenced to match classroom phonics programmes
